title: callicarpa oblanceolata
intro: Callicarpa oblanceolata is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the purple fruit or fringed gentian, native to Southeast Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Callicarpa oblanceolata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Callicarpa oblanceolata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
